documentation.description:
Implementation of the MT19937-64 pseudorandom number generator. It is
based on work:

   A C-program for MT19937-64 (2004/9/29 version).
   Coded by Takuji Nishimura and Makoto Matsumoto.

http://www.math.sci.hiroshima-u.ac.jp/m-mat/MT/VERSIONS/C-LANG/mt19937-64.c

subprograms.name: Generate
subprograms.code: function Generate (Self : in out Generator) return Interfaces.Integer_64

documentation.description: Generates a random number on [0, 2^63-1] interval.

subprograms.name: Generate
subprograms.code: function Generate (Self : in out Generator) return Interfaces.Unsigned_64

documentation.description: Generates a random number on [0, 2^64-1] interval.

subprograms.name: Generate_EE
subprograms.code:
function Generate_EE
  (Self : in out Generator) return Interfaces.IEEE_Float_64

documentation.description: Generates a random number on (0,1) interval.

subprograms.name: Generate_IE
subprograms.code:
function Generate_IE
  (Self : in out Generator) return Interfaces.IEEE_Float_64

documentation.description: Generates a random number on [0,1) interval.

subprograms.name: Generate_II
subprograms.code:
